scenario: ResourceQuota exceeded — pod stuck Pending because namespace quota is full
notes: Namespace 'staging' has a ResourceQuota capping total CPU requests at 4 cores. Existing pods already consume 3.8 cores. worker-service requests 500m CPU per replica (replicaCount=2 → 1 CPU total). Pod stays Pending with FailedScheduling event citing exceeded quota. Fix: increase quota or reduce resource requests.
